description: Use this API to retrieve the problems that occurred during the last unzip attempt. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, indexes, problems, paths, types = scenariounzipproblems()
python_syntax: ierr, indexes, problems, paths, types = scenariounzipproblems()

return_values.name: indexes
return_values.description: An array of ERRCNT elements specifying internal problem index which will be used in SCENARIOUNZIPSOLUTIONS. (output).

return_values.name: problems
return_values.description: An array of ERRCNT elements specifying problems that were encountered. (output).

return_values.name: paths
return_values.description: An array of ERRCNT elements specifying full file paths of all files that had problems being extracted. (output).

return_values.name: types
return_values.description: An array of ERRCNT elements specifying file types associated with each file. (output).

problems.description: a file with the specified name does not exist in the archive.
a directory with the specified file name already exists.
